adminPackages.heading: Premium Packages
adminPackages.subtitle: {total} packages · {placeholder} awaiting a real partner
adminPackages.promoteHint: Mark as a real onboarded partner — this unlocks booking and payment
adminPackages.demoteHint: Mark back as placeholder — this blocks booking and payment
adminPackages.confirmPromote:
Promote "{title}" to a real partner?

This unlocks booking and payment for this package. Only do this once the venue is genuinely onboarded and the contact details and imagery have been replaced.

seedBanner.title: Placeholder inventory is live
seedBanner.body: {count, plural, one {# package is} other {# packages are}} seeded placeholder supply. They browse and render exactly like real listings, and they capture enquiries — but they cannot be booked or paid for. Promote one once its venue is genuinely onboarded.

forbidden.title: Admin access required
forbidden.body: This page is limited to administrators.

adminPackages.footnote: Placeholder packages are fully browsable and capture enquiries. Only the booking and payment path is blocked.
adminPackages.genericError: That change could not be saved. Please try again.
